{
  "situation_update": "Khattak Sahab, with focused intensity, masterfully inputs the complex code sequence into the vault's first security panel, causing a triumphant green light to flash across the display. The heavy outer door hisses open, revealing the next formidable barrier as Kardar and Pinky maintain vigilant watch on their surroundings.",
  "vault_delta": 18,
  "police_alert_delta": -1,
  "team_caught": null,
  "team_action": "The crew successfully disabled the first security layer of the vault."
}
